name: GREATEST
description: Returns the largest value among the given numeric expressions. NULL arguments are ignored; the result is NULL only if every argument is NULL.

parameters.name: expressions
parameters.description: One or more numeric expressions to compare

examples.title: Highest of multiple prices
examples.description: Pick the largest price across markets
examples.sql: SELECT GREATEST(price_us, price_eu, price_uk) AS max_price FROM products

examples.title: Floor on a computed value
examples.description: Never let the discount go below zero
examples.sql: SELECT GREATEST(0, base_price - rebate) AS net FROM orders

notes: Returns NULL only if every argument is NULL
All arguments should be numeric and have comparable types
